command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
JOB_ID="job-20260625T053228Z-16ca7671"

echo '=== JOB STATUS POLL ==='
PAYLOAD=$(python3 -c "import json,base64; print(base64.b64encode(json.dumps({'action':'get_job_status','job_id':'$JOB_ID','origin':'test','requested_by':'jose'}).encode()).decode())")
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate n8n --payload-b64 '$PAYLOAD'" 2>&1

echo '=== JOB FILE CONTENTS ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cat /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/jobs/$JOB_ID/job.json 2>/dev/null" 2>&1

echo '=== DELEGATOR LOGS ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "ls /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/logs/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 && tail -30 /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/logs/*.log 2>/dev/null | head -50" 2>&1

echo '=== FIND DELEGATOR SOURCE ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "find /home/jose -name 'moreno_unified_delegator*' -o -name 'unified_delegator*' 2>/dev/null | grep -v __pycache__ | grep -v .git | head -10; pip3 show moreno-unified-delegator 2>/dev/null | head -5" 2>&1

echo DONE_1912
